hero.label: Made for Terrakotta
hero.headline: I’d love to help Terrakotta build the outbound engine behind a category-defining sales product.
hero.subheadline: Terrakotta is selling to a phone-first market where speed, relevance, and persistence matter. That is exactly the kind of environment where I can contribute early, because my background is in outbound pipeline generation, not just theory.

whyCompany.title: The motion matches how I work
whyCompany.body: Terrakotta is building for phone-first sellers and outbound deal flow. I already know how to do prospecting, cold outreach, qualification, and follow-up from my BDR work at Copygen.ai.

whyCompany.title: I like early-stage, messy GTM
whyCompany.body: A founding SDR role means helping shape the playbook, not just inheriting one. That is a big part of the appeal for me. I want the reps, the feedback loops, and the chance to improve the process as I go.

whyCompany.title: I can speak both operator and automation
whyCompany.body: On the side, I’ve deployed OpenClaw AI agents, including an automated BDR workflow. That gives me a practical feel for where automation helps, where human judgment still wins, and how to make both work together in GTM.

quote: Terrakotta feels like the kind of team where hard work compounds fast, and that’s exactly the environment I want.
